channel.title: Awesome Search KG
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Awesome Search KG

item.title: Doug Turnbull
item.description: Doug Turnbull Co-founder of OpenSource Connections (OSC); co-author of Relevant Search (O’Reilly).

item.title: LinkedIn
item.description: LinkedIn Professional social network (>1 billion members).

item.title: Shaped
item.description: Shaped Recommendation and ranking platform (shaped.ai). Exposes ranking models like LambdaMART through a policy-config system (e.g.

item.title: Agentic Search
item.description: Agentic Search Definition Agentic search refers to search systems that go beyond simple retrieval to plan, decompose, execute, verify, and refine — functioning more like engineering teams pursuing goals under uncertainty than simple lookup functions.

item.title: LambdaLoss
item.description: LambdaLoss Stub. Created as a placeholder — expand with vault-sourced content.

item.title: LambdaMART
item.description: LambdaMART Stub. Created as a placeholder — expand with vault-sourced content.

item.title: Ranking Objectives
item.description: Ranking Objectives The objective (loss) function a Learning to Rank model optimizes.

item.title: Zero Results
item.description: Zero Results Definition A zero-results query returns no documents to the user.

item.title: History
item.description: Awesome Search — Note History Chronological log of notes added to this knowledge graph. Newest first.

item.title: Atita Arora
item.description: Atita Arora Search and relevance practitioner who consults across search and retrieval (and increasingly AI-boosted features) in e-commerce, health, media, finance, legal, enterprise, government, geospatial, and marketplace systems.
